test_cases.title: Verify Example.com Homepage Loads
test_cases.description: Navigate to example.com and verify the page title and heading are correct.

steps.description: Verify the page title is 'Example Domain'
Verify the h1 heading says 'Example Domain'

test_cases.expected_result: Homepage loads with correct title and heading

test_cases.title: Verify 'More information' Link Exists
test_cases.description: Check that the 'More information...' link is present on example.com.

steps.description: Take a page snapshot to inspect the DOM
Verify the 'More information...' link is present

test_cases.expected_result: The 'More information...' link should be visible on the page
